occupation_definition: Perform any combination of light cleaning duties to maintain private households or commercial establishments, such as hotels and hospitals, in a clean and orderly manner. Duties may include making beds, replenishing linens, cleaning rooms and halls, and vacuuming.

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Building and Grounds Cleaning and Maintenance Occupations
Building Cleaning and Pest Control Workers

siblings.occupation_title: Janitors and Cleaners, Except Maids and Housekeeping Cleaners
